[2018-07-07 00:43] leary93: Ye but that's what you do by not killing the wild drone yet tho right?
[2018-07-07 00:43] mrguy888: If they really have exact gold to do what they want you probably want to put them off of that
[2018-07-07 00:43] leary93: because they buy wall over splitter
[2018-07-07 00:43] leary93: and then the wall does nothing
[2018-07-07 00:43] leary93: because u kill the wild a turn later
[2018-07-07 00:43] mrguy888: What if splitter does nothing because of your wilds?
[2018-07-07 00:43] leary93: then it's still more than a wall
[2018-07-07 00:43] leary93: because a splitter is building up attack
[2018-07-07 00:44] mrguy888: No, by killing the engis you make them happy to buy a wall instead of being sad about anything they do with that blue
[2018-07-07 00:44] leary93: but they don't just buy a wall, they also have to hold a drone right?
[2018-07-07 00:44] leary93: I cant see how denying absorb makes your opp happy
[2018-07-07 00:44] mrguy888: If you are denying absorb you kill the wilds
[2018-07-07 00:44] mrguy888: people arent argueing that right?
[2018-07-07 00:45] leary93: No we were talking before a wall is built
[2018-07-07 00:45] leary93: do you kill engi's or wild
[2018-07-07 00:45] leary93: and Im not argueing you always kill engis
[2018-07-07 00:45] leary93: but I think you should if it completes all of the goals I mentioned?
[2018-07-07 00:45] xyotsuba: It depends how much defense you force out by killing the engis
[2018-07-07 00:46] leary93: Clearly if they are already building engi's in advance
[2018-07-07 00:46] mrguy888: It is very position dependant.
[2018-07-07 00:46] leary93: you dont kill the engis
[2018-07-07 00:46] leary93: then the 2nd goal or the 3rd doesnt hold true
[2018-07-07 00:46] leary93: thats why I explicitly stated the 3 goals
[2018-07-07 00:46] mrguy888: If forcing them to buy defence is just making them happy to spend a blue they would otherwise be sad about spending then you aren't doing that much
[2018-07-07 00:47] mrguy888: What if they buy that wall either way? That is a very likely situation
[2018-07-07 00:47] leary93: Then why would you kill the wild drone now and give them free absorb next turn?
[2018-07-07 00:47] leary93: instead of kill 3 engis this turn and deny 3 absorb next
[2018-07-07 00:48] leary93: thats +4 gold net, removes the option to build drones for a turn, removes granularity
[2018-07-07 00:48] xyotsuba: Well they probably have another wild
[2018-07-07 00:48] xyotsuba: If they only have 1 u def wanna wait for the wall to come out
[2018-07-07 00:48] leary93: Then you STILL deny an extra turn of absorb
[2018-07-07 00:49] xyotsuba: Yeah but not denying in 3 turns is a lot different than not denying absorb next turn
[2018-07-07 00:49] leary93: it's still forcing granularity
[2018-07-07 00:49] leary93: and removing the options to buy drones
[2018-07-07 00:50] xyotsuba: Yeah but that’s a separate argument
[2018-07-07 00:50] amalloy: @Deleted User most of what you are saying i don't disagree with. it's this "don't let them buy drones thing" i disagree with. it's better to delete actual drones they have right now, getting them money for free every turn, than to make it impossible for them to buy more drones
[2018-07-07 00:51] leary93: that's not what im saying
[2018-07-07 00:51] leary93: Im not saying you should kill engis if you deny drones being build
[2018-07-07 00:51] leary93: that's pulling it out of context
[2018-07-07 00:52] f300xen (f0x): if your opponent is econing up shouldn't you kill their econ unless you can actually punish them for econing up
[2018-07-07 00:52] leary93: im just gonna leave this discussion right now before I get frustrated
[2018-07-07 00:53] amalloy: i guess i don't understand the context you're implying/assuming with "In low inflation, killing all the engis is prob still worth because it removes the option to keep getting drones that turn"

[2018-07-07 16:43] cactus_wren (cactus): kinetic drivers are good early right
[2018-07-07 16:43] cactus_wren (cactus): cuz even though they have a lifespan you can pop them at key moments to stop your opponent from defending
[2018-07-07 16:43] leary93: depends on the game, but generally they are decent yeah
[2018-07-07 16:44] cactus_wren (cactus): grimbots are typically bad early though
[2018-07-07 16:44] leary93: they probably do better in the mid-game though
[2018-07-07 16:44] cactus_wren (cactus): like you want to start building grimbots on like turn 5 not on turn 3
[2018-07-07 16:44] leary93: Also depends, but generally you dont want to buy botches that just get absorbed anyways
[2018-07-07 16:44] leary93: and definetly not if they wont be soaking
[2018-07-07 16:46] leary93: but there are also games where buying botches first can be so devestating you can transition better into permanent attack than your opp
[2018-07-07 16:46] leary93: like for example, evil animus performs crazy well with botches first if there's no good defense
[2018-07-07 16:50] leary93: also @CachoTognax I'd prob have tia'd over redeemer t6, but you played it well anyways. Opp didn't have red yet so your redeemer was way safer than his
[2018-07-07 16:53] extratricky: with thorium as 1, p1's DD D1 A
[2018-07-07 16:53] zezetel: dd d1 a as p1 with thorium beeing 1
[2018-07-07 16:53] cactus_wren (cactus): why is it called evil animus
[2018-07-07 16:53] swapgo: As a response to dd 11 from p2
[2018-07-07 16:53] swapgo: Because its basically kicking someone while theyre on 3 drones
[2018-07-07 16:53] swapgo: Your opponent cant do shit in response
[2018-07-07 16:54] swapgo: Like if there are Vores/Botches/Ferals in a Thorium set going DD 11 is super risky
[2018-07-07 16:55] cactus_wren (cactus): well if you didn't want to be exploited you shouldn't have left yourself open
[2018-07-07 16:55] swapgo: Bonus points for going like Perf Perf Fission or something
[2018-07-07 16:55] swapgo: Or anything involving Fibroid
[2018-07-07 16:59] cachotognax: tia t6 was the good play, my opponent would have not been able to defend it.
[2018-07-07 17:07] wilson0862 (Wilson): "well if you didn't want to be exploited you shouldn't have left yourself open"
Literally irrelevant.
[2018-07-07 17:07] wilson0862 (Wilson): ^ to why the opening is named that
[2018-07-07 17:08] cachotognax: is there ever a set where plasmafier is wrong?
[2018-07-07 17:08] swapgo: And when there's good soak I guess
[2018-07-07 17:08] wilson0862 (Wilson): Green will virtually never be bad.
[2018-07-07 17:08] cachotognax: I guess my opponents are bad, I just win once I buy the second.
[2018-07-07 17:09] swapgo: If there is good soak then making plasma instead of cheaper long term attackers will run your drones dry
[2018-07-07 17:11] cachotognax: well, this set had plexo, the worst soak possible aganist plasma I think, I guess when there's actually good one I might avoid it
[2018-07-07 17:11] swapgo: Id say Plex is OK against the second Plasmafier but defintely not against the first
[2018-07-07 17:12] xujhan: Ampo, Ematrix, Doomed wall, I Grid, Blood pact, Corpus, Nitrocybe, X. That set is probably an ampo set regardless of what X is.
[2018-07-07 17:12] cachotognax: holding both is bad I guess, but you still get 2 drones for it while your opponent spends 1 and the resources.
[2018-07-07 17:13] swapgo: They traded 1 drone for timewalking you
[2018-07-07 17:13] xujhan: Maybe? I know I've seen 3 animus to make 2 ampo per turn overrun apollo.
[2018-07-07 17:13] wilson0862 (Wilson): Well you could maybe stack ani--
[2018-07-07 17:13] cachotognax: timewalking, this is a new term for me.
[2018-07-07 17:13] cogito3 (Cogito): about plasma, some sets are too fast for it
[2018-07-07 17:13] wilson0862 (Wilson): I've definitely killed apollo with ampo. It's a lot of fun.
[2018-07-07 17:13] swapgo: Timewalking: Invalidating your entire turn, usually for cheap
[2018-07-07 17:13] cogito3 (Cogito): and it's probably a bad idea to hold plasma vs plexo unless you have very few other attackers
[2018-07-07 17:14] swapgo: Like, in MtG, if i cast this giant 7 mana spell and it gets countered
[2018-07-07 17:14] swapgo: I just got Timewalked
[2018-07-07 17:14] swapgo: Because my opponent basically got an extra turn
[2018-07-07 17:14] cachotognax: I still get my gold and resources, it just avoided 8 attack, wich is nice, I don't find it that extreme.
[2018-07-07 17:15] swapgo: But there are probably other constant attackers doing work
[2018-07-07 17:15] cogito3 (Cogito): it's more like your combat phase got skipped
[2018-07-07 17:15] swapgo: Theirs are getting value, yours are probably getting soaked by Plex and absorbed
[2018-07-07 17:15] cogito3 (Cogito): I guess it's an interesting question, if you have plasma and your opponent plexos, how much stuff does your plasma have to kill for clicking it to be worth it? It should be at least 2 HP
[2018-07-07 17:17] swapgo: If your opponent Plasmas and you Plexo it every turn

[2018-07-07 20:22] hologoddessofgrainandapples (Pblur): Something I don't understand: suppose you have walls and an omega splitter to absorb on. People seem to almost always hold the splitter and absorb on it. But... it seems to me like it ought to be even; you're absorbing for 3 less, but attacking for 3 more. Assuming we're over their absorb barrier already, shouldn't these options be equal?
[2018-07-07 20:23] f300xen (f0x): your opponent has to defend for the 3 even though you don't attack
[2018-07-07 20:23] f300xen (f0x): so you get the 3 absorb "faster" than you get the 3 attack
[2018-07-07 20:24] Deleted User (Deleted User): you gain defense now, but opp loses the defense half a turn from now. Plus 6 defense tempo
[2018-07-07 20:29] namington: yeah, because they need to preemptively defend the omega attack, they end up buying defense before you would - so you basically get the defense "faster" than them by holding
[2018-07-07 20:30] namington: or you can think of it as "buying defense before you need it is generally bad, and by not attacking, thats basically what im doing to my opponent while still getting defensive value"
[2018-07-07 20:30] namington: either way, absorbing with omega comes out a bit better in terms of half-turn efficiency
[2018-07-07 20:31] namington: _that said_, if the attack is really uncomfortable for them to deal with for some reason (they have to use rhino soak to defend next turn or wall supply is almost out, etc) then attacking can still be smart

[2018-07-09 19:29] willflame: would you alternate absorbing on Xaetron and Wall?
[2018-07-09 19:29] amalloy: the worse your other absorber is, the better it is to use xaetron as a defender
[2018-07-09 19:30] willflame: but why not just always absorb on Xaetron?
[2018-07-09 19:30] amalloy: so, when you absorb on wall, you gain 2 "free" health, right?
[2018-07-09 19:30] amalloy: and xaetron gains 4 free health every turn (whether absorbing on him or on wall)
[2018-07-09 19:31] amalloy: so if you always absorb on xaetron, you get 4 free health every turn. if you alternate, you get 4 health on the turns when xaetron absorbs, and 2+4=6 health when wall absorbs and xaetron heals
[2018-07-09 19:31] willflame: but on those turns, you also have to overdefend
[2018-07-09 19:32] amalloy: yes, you have to buy some defense a bit early
[2018-07-09 19:33] willflame: but is the 2 extra "free" health worth buying more defence earlier?
[2018-07-09 19:33] willflame: because that gold could've been used for attackers
[2018-07-09 19:35] xujhan: Usually yes, because you only delay those attackers by a turn.
[2018-07-09 19:35] amalloy: you have less tempo on the wall turns, which is made up for by having more tempo on the xaetron turns
[2018-07-09 19:36] willflame: and on the Xaetron absorb turns, you absorb for maximum on it, right?
[2018-07-09 19:36] amalloy: yes, you'd like to get it to 1
[2018-07-09 19:38] willflame: also, it is worth buying Shredder/Hannibull once your opponent is able to kill it next turn?
[2018-07-09 19:39] flameberger: the damage they soak for their cost is pretty good
[2018-07-09 19:39] willflame: so would you block or attack with them?
[2018-07-09 19:43] flameberger: guess it would depend on what would be dying instead if I attacked with them and the opponent chose not to frontline them. I imagine I would generally just leave them on defense if I was buying them late game for soak, and then get that much less force fields or whatever else. I'm deff no hannibull expert though
